children.title: To lay down the procedure for Preventive maintenance of Tablet Compression Machine
This SOP describes the steps to be followed for preventive maintenance of the Tablet
children.content: compression machine (Make: KORSCH/KILIAN/SEJONG/FETTE) at process area of Granules India limited, Gagillapur.

children.title: Technician - Engineering shall follow the Procedure.
Executive - Engineering shall train and monitor the execution.
Head/Designee -Engineering shall ensure the compliance.
IPQA- person has to ensure the cGMP compliance.

title: PROCEDURE
content: Before start up, follow the procedures and comply with SOP no. GGMN073 Preventive Maintenance Plan.

children.title: Monthly Preventive Maintenance
Check the turret for free rotation by rotating hand wheel, if required lubricate with suitable
Check the roller arm for free movement condition and apply food grade oil/ grease if
Check and ensure the functionality of safety interlocks such as emergency stop button
children.content: (Operation panel and side of the equipment etc..,) Press any emergency push button the equipment should STOP. Door interlocks sensors (windows and side doors etc..,), If any door/window opens the equipment should STOP. If required rectify or replace with like-to- like

children.title: Check and tighten all electrical/earthing connections, and clean the panel with blower.
Check the condition and function of suction manifolds, clean if required.
Check the oil level of drive gearbox fill up to 3/4th level if required.
Check the pipe condition, leakage and function of auto lubrication system and hydraulic
children.content: system. Fill with suitable grade oil up to the identification mark in the tank, if required. Prepared By Reviewed By Approved By Name P.Chandra Sekhar T.Vinay Kumar T.Kiran Role Initiator-MN HOD-MN Approver-QA Date & Time 16/06/2021 09:18 16/06/2021 09:41 16/06/2021 10:23

children.title: Check all the timer belts tension with thumb, press physically at widest range or at center in
children.content: between the drive and idler pulley. If required align the idler pulley, and check the condition of belts replace if required.

children.title: Check the Pressure roller bearings for wear replace or lubricate if required.
Check the tightness of fasteners like screws of doser, rotor (e.g., Bolts, Nuts and Clamps). If
children.content: any found worn-out replace with new.

children.title: Check the rotary feeder bearings for wear, replace it if required.
Check the condition of door gasket for wear, tears and like bulges, peel off etc..., If required
Check the oil wipers for wear and absence of damage. Replace if necessary. (KORSCH)
Put a tick mark (√) in Monthly check sheet as per Attachments-V, VIII, XI & XIV (Form
children.content: No.: GFMN032/F-05, 08, 11 & 14) after completion of each activity. If it is not OK put a cross mark (X) in Monthly check list indicating the reason in remarks column.

children.title: Quarterly Preventive Maintenance
Check all the fasteners of feeders and dosing unit for tightness replace the bolts if any worn-
Check the sealing ring between compression rollers and compression roller column, any
Check and replace if any dents or grooves are deep and more on circumference of Pressure
Check and tighten the variable frequency drive (VFD) and motor terminals
Check the function of rejection system (Single Shot Rejection and Initial Rejection).
Check the solenoid valves for proper functioning, replace if required.
Check the main motor belt condition, replace the belt if required. (KORSCH/SEJONG)
Check the feeder paddle for proper functioning, replace if required.
Check the gearbox oil level and it should be above 3/4th level. Fill with suitable grade oil if
Check the below functions of amplifier as per Attachment-IV for KORSH compression
Check the terminal connections of Amplifier and tighten up.
Check the Amplifier supply 24V with multimeter.
Check the SMPS if 24V not getting at the Amplifier and Change the SMPS if required.
Check the Amplifier earth connections
Check the Power Signal light it should be Green color when 24V supply is Ok.
Check the Communication signal light at Amplifier it should be Green when Amplifier
children.content: working good and Communication is Ok. If it indicates Red color it states Communication problem or Amplifier problem so rectify the problem or Change the Amplifier.

children.title: Check the wiring in electrical panel for loose connections like motor connectors, switches,
children.content: relays, contactors, MCB etc., tighten if required.

children.title: Check the PU pipe connections and FRL unit of the compressed air, replace if required.
children.content: Prepared By Reviewed By Approved By Name P.Chandra Sekhar T.Vinay Kumar T.Kiran Role Initiator-MN HOD-MN Approver-QA Date & Time 16/06/2021 09:18 16/06/2021 09:41 16/06/2021 10:23

children.title: Check the coolant level in cooling unit if required top up to 3/4th level (FETTE).
Turret lifter check points (FETTE):
Check the lifter charging unit for proper working.
Check the motor unit and lead screw for lubrication
Check the smooth movement of wheels and tighten all bolts of lifter.
Check the Turret drive shaft bolts (Allen bolts) condition, if required replace with new bolts.
Check for the damages and wear of Fan, Filter mats and Switch cabinet for Air conditioning
Check for damages and wear of Cooling system main drive Fan and Filter mats, replace if
Check for any damages to switch cabinet sealing’s replace if necessary (FETTE).
Check for any damages and wear for Fans and Filter mats of Switch cabinet, replace if
Replace the grease of the main shaft, until grease escapes from the outlets (KORSCH)
Check the filter element and reservoir of pneumatic systems(KORSCH).
Check the material feed, check the condition of the seals and replace if
Check the encoder working condition, replace if required(SEJONG).
Check the cables continuity and connections of Main communication distribution
Put a Tick mark (√) in Quarterly Check Sheet as per Attachments-VI, IX, XII & XV (Form
children.content: No.: GFMN032/F-06, 09, 12 & 15) after completion of each activity. If it is not OK put a cross mark (X)in Quarterly check list indicating the reason in remarks column and repeat the steps as per 5.1

children.title: Yearly Preventive Maintenance
Check the main drive bearings, replace if required.
Check the rated amperes and resistance of all the motors as per manufacture specifications. If
children.content: require validate the Feeder & rotor (Turret) RPM.

children.title: Check and replace the gearbox oil seals and gear oil if there is any leakage.
Check for any noise or vibration of turret in empty run at an optimum speed.
Check the condition of lubrication pipes, connectors fitted in and on the turret.
Check the upper and lower pressure rollers and replace if required.
Check for damages of window flaps, replace if necessary (FETTE)
Check the PC battery working condition, replace if required. (Korsch)
Check the rollers spring washers, replace if any damage. (Sejong)
Put a Tick mark (√) in Yearly check sheet as per Attachments-VII, X, XIII & XVI (Form
children.content: No.: GFMN032/F-07, 10, 13 & 16) after completion of each activity. If it is not OK put a cross mark (X) in Yearly check list indicating the reason in remarks column and repeat the steps as per 5.1& 5.2. Prepared By Reviewed By Approved By Name P.Chandra Sekhar T.Vinay Kumar T.Kiran Role Initiator-MN HOD-MN Approver-QA Date & Time 16/06/2021 09:18 16/06/2021 09:41 16/06/2021 10:23

children.title: If any service or repairs were done, then the work details and spares replacement should be
children.content: mention in Equipment History card as per SOP GGMN073.

children.title: If any deviation/abnormalities are noticed during the Preventive maintenance, inform to
children.content: the concerned superior and QA. If it is not OK put a cross mark (X) and take necessary corrective action as per the advice.

children.title: Any such deviations should be maintained in the Annual Maintenance Summery along
children.content: with necessary corrective action and its compliance thereof.

title: Abbreviation (S)
content: Abbreviation Full Description VFD Variable frequency drive FRL Filter Regulator and Lubricator MCB Main circuit board RPM Revolutions per minute SMPS Switching mode power supply

title: REVISION HISTORY
content: Detailed revision history log (see children nodes).

children.title: Revision 00
Revision 01
children.content: 1) Point no 4.1.1, 4.1.2, 4.1.3, 4.1.5, 4.1.7 and 4.1.9 are incorporated in Fortnight preventive maintenance. 2) Point no 4.2.1, 4.2.6, 4.2.7, and 4.2.9 are incorporated in quarterly preventive maintenance. 3) Point no 4.3.3, 4.3.5, 4.3.6, and 4.3.7 are incorporated in Yearly preventive maintenance.

children.title: Revision 02
children.content: 1) Location and area is added. 2)Point No 4.1.1,4.3.3 is changed

children.title: Revision 03
children.content: 1) Fortnight removed and monthly added. 2) Fortnight preventive maintenance check points are incorporated in Monthly preventive maintenance. 3) This SOP is common SOP for all compression machines (Make: ACG/KORSCH/KILIAN/SEJONG) and title was changed. 4) Point No 4.1.11 modified. 5) Point No 4.1.4 and 4.2.11 elaborated. 6) Point No 4.2.14, and 4.2.15 are added in quarterly preventive maintenance. 7) Point No 4.1.13 and 4.1.16 are removed from Monthly preventive maintenance. 8) Point No 4.3.1 and 4.3.9 removed from yearly preventive maintenance.

children.title: Revision 04
children.content: 1) Attachment-IV incorporated to include the PM checks flow char for Amplifiers 2) Attachment-II Modified 3) Revision number given wrong in previous revision of SOP, So now its remains 04 only.

children.title: Revision 05
children.content: 1. This SOP is common for all compression machines So Make: FETTE incorporated in Title. 2. Point 1.1 is modified 3. Point 2.1 is modified 4. Point no. 4.2.16 and 4.2.17 are incorporated in quarterly preventive maintenance. 5. Point 5.1, 5.2, and 5.3 modified. (Reference change control number: TCC/176/17)

children.title: Revision 06
children.content: 1. Point number 4.1.1 modified as “Check and rotate the turret with hand wheel for free rotation” 2. Attachment-1-point Number 1 modified 3. New Check point added in 4.2.17 and Sequential numbers changed accordingly. 4. In the Attachment-II new check point added in point number 17. (Reference change control TCC/135/18)

children.title: Revision 07
children.content: 1. Modified the title, objective, and scope by removing the ACG machine. 2. Point No: 3.3 modified by adding Designee. 3. Point No: 4.1.1, 4.1.2, 4.1.3, 4.1.10, 4.1.11, 4.1.13, 4.2.9, 4.2.10, 4.2.12.6 4.2.17, 4.3.1 and 4.3.7 elaborated for better understanding. 3. Point No: 4.1.7 elaborated as per CAPA No: CAPA/20/330 4. Point No: 4.1.9 removed from Monthly preventive maintenance. 5. Point No: 4.2.2 and 4.2.4 removed from Quarterly preventive maintenance. 6. Point No: 4.3.9 removed from Yearly preventive maintenance. 6. Attachment-I, II & III obsolete. 7. Each makes wise attachments separated. Attachment-V (Monthly) VI (Quarterly) & VII (Yearly) for KORSCH. Attachment-VIII (Monthly), IX (Quarterly) & X (Yearly) for KILIAN. Attachment-XI (Monthly) XII (Quarterly) & (Yearly) XIII for SEJONG. Attachment-XIV (Monthly) XV (Quarterly) & XVI (Yearly) for FETTE. Refer CC: TCC/129/20.

children.title: Revision 08
children.content: 1. Point No: 4.1.4 modified by adding earthing 2. Point No: 4.1.13, 4.2.16, 4.2.17, 4.2.18, 4.2.19, 4.2.20, 4.2.21, 4.2.22,4.2.23, 4.3.7, 4.3.8 & 4.3.9 added (Attachment- V, VI, VII, VIII, XI, XII, XIV, XV & XVI modified accordingly) Refer CC: GGP/FDU/CC/20/XXXX

children.title: Revision 09
children.content: 1. Point No. 3.4 added in Responsibility 2. Point No. 4.0 ‘Definitions’ and Point No. 8.0 ‘References’ included as per SOP NO. GIL-CQA-024 and subsequent points were changed accordingly. 3. Point No. 9.0 ‘Revision history’ updated as per SOP NO. GIL-CQA-024. 4. Point 5.2.24 added in Quarterly 5. Attachment IV, V, VI, VII, VIII, IX, X, XI, XII, XIII, XIV, XV, XVI updated as per SOP NO. GIL-CQA-024
